---
name: "Feature Request"
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for Rollout.io
title: "[FEATURE] <your-short-feature-description>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

### Feature Suggestion
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

### Problem Statement
Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe. (e.g. I'm always frustrated when...)

### Desired Solution
A clear and concise description of the ideal behavior or solution you would like to see.

### Alternative Solutions
Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

### Additional Context
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
